name: task-swarm
description: Multi-agent orchestration driven by a pipeline.yml: semantic task groups with cross-group concurrency, fork coders, and per-group reviewer + validator loops. v0.5–0.7 progressively land FIX-1/2 + 方案 D (path injection). 0.7.4 强化方案 D（M5+M6+M10）：task.md 段头加 subdir 扫描规则说明 + 硬约束语言 + inbox 自动 drop `_PROJECT_AGENT_DOCS.md` sentinel. 0.8.0 lands AI-EDS v0.9 lifecycle group: M7 init dedupe（spec_id 已有活跃 run 时按 --on-existing 策略处理 error/resume/abort-old/force-new）+ M3 pipeline.yml schema 字段 `run.pipeline_end_validator: bool` 持久化到 state.json（plan/advance 消费 logic 留 v0.8.1）。M2 run-loop（auto-advance）单独 PR 推进。Requires codemap-aimemory 0.4.3+ (codemap knowledge CLI).
